name: San Francisco Baked Rice
recipeInstructions:
1. Heat the butter in a large skillet over medium heat.
2. Add the onions and sauté for 5 minutes until softened but not browned.
3. Stir in the rice to coat it thoroughly with the butter.
4. Add the boiling water and mix well.
5. Season with salt, to taste.
6. Cover and bake at 350°F for 18-20 minutes until tender and all liquid is absorbed.
7. Remove from the oven and taste. If not yet tender, return to the oven for 3-6 minutes as needed.
8. Transfer to a hotel pan.
9. Fluff with a fork.
10. Serve hot.
